name: IdsEdwPMbrSuplmtBnfExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte1 AS (SELECT COALESCE(CD.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS ORIG_SRC_SYS_CD, PMSB.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, PMSB.MNTL_HLTH_VNDR_ID, PMSB.PBM_VNDR_CD, PMSB.WELNS_BNF_LVL_CD, PMSB.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO, PMSB.WELNS_BNF_VNDR_ID, PMSB.EAP_BNF_LVL_CD, PMSB.VSN_BNF_VNDR_ID, PMSB.VSN_RTN_EXAM_IN, PMSB.VSN_HRDWR_IN, PMSB.VSN_OUT_OF_NTWK_EXAM_IN, PMSB.OTHR_CAR_PRI_MED_IN, PMSB.VBB_ENR_IN, PMSB.VBB_MDL_CD, PMSB.CMPSS_COV_IN, PMSB.ALNO_HOME_PG_ID, PMSB.PCMH_IN, PMSB.DNTL_RWRD_IN FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_MBR_SUPLMT_BNF PMSB LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD ON PMSB.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD.CD_MPPNG_SK), cte2 AS (SELECT CASE WHEN RTRIM(LTRIM(cte1.ORIG_SRC_SYS_CD)) = '' THEN 'UNK' WHEN cte1.ORIG_SRC_SYS_CD IS NULL THEN 'UNK' ELSE cte1.ORIG_SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, cte1.MBR_UNIQ_KEY, cte1.MNTL_HLTH_VNDR_ID, cte1.PBM_VNDR_CD, cte1.WELNS_BNF_LVL_CD, cte1.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO, cte1.WELNS_BNF_VNDR_ID, cte1.EAP_BNF_LVL_CD, cte1.VSN_BNF_VNDR_ID, cte1.VSN_RTN_EXAM_IN, cte1.VSN_HRDWR_IN, cte1.VSN_OUT_OF_NTWK_EXAM_IN, cte1.OTHR_CAR_PRI_MED_IN, cte1.VBB_ENR_IN, cte1.VBB_MDL_CD, cte1.CMPSS_COV_IN, cte1.ALNO_HOME_PG_ID, cte1.PCMH_IN, cte1.DNTL_RWRD_IN FROM cte1) SELECT * FROM cte2
